creator: fc@daemon.pizza
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

I've added changed the WWW link as suggested.

I've updated the pkg-descr with a second paragraph inspired by the intro section. The new pkg-descr looks like this:


Himalaya is a command-line interface for email management. Himalaya provides
easy-to-use commands to list emails in an inbox, read, and send emails.
Multiple accounts (email addresses) are supported. Himalaya uses a simple TOML
file for configuration. Users of other command-line email clients will find it
familiar, and newcomers will have a low learning curve.

Himalaya strives to be everything you need for email. Backed by the Rust
library himalaya-lib, you can build any tool or workflow you'd like.
In addition to the command-line interface, there exists a Vim and Emacs plugin
demonstrating the integration of Himalaya into your favorite editor.


I will send the updated patch if this is approved.

Thanks for the timely review!
